evidence: The rough ER is grouped under RoughER_Connection with a hidden ER_Mitosis_Disconnect_Seam marker for future envelope-breakdown animation.
The folded sheets and ribosome dots are parented to the RoughER_Connection root so they can move as one context layer.
The bridge and lumen band provide named geometry for later sway or detach animation.
remaining_risks: No production sway animation is authored yet.
Mitosis disconnect behavior is only represented as a hidden marker, not a complete animation.
Roblox runtime animation mapping must be added in a later pass.
required_fixes_before_export: Add bridge sway and optional mitosis detach animation events before final export.
Map ER_Mitosis_Disconnect_Seam into the whole-cell animation event map.
